scripts.check:structure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['README.md','SUMMARY.md','2017','2018','2020','2024','2025','2026','drafts']; const missing=required.filter((path)=>!fs.existsSync(path)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing required paths: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('Structure check passed.');"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const target=path.resolve('_book'); const cwd=process.cwd(); if(target!==path.join(cwd,'_book')){throw new Error('Refusing to clean unexpected path: '+target);} fs.rmSync(target,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Cleaned _book.');"
